title: Align Subitems with Parent Columns
excerpt: Smartsheet has aligned parent items and subitems. That would be a nice feature to give people the option to align subitems with their parent items.

posts.author: ebud (Emily Budden)
posts.cookedHtml: Smartsheet has aligned parent items and subitems. That would be a nice feature to give people the option to align subitems with their parent items.
